email.description:
The email of the user.
Max length: 255

id.description: The ACC ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the user.

firstName.description:
The user’s first name. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

lastName.description:
The user’s last name. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

autodeskId.description:
The ID of the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

addressLine1.description:
The user’s address line 1. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

addressLine2.description:
The user’s address line 2. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

city.description:
The User’s city. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

stateOrProvince.description:
The state or province of the user. The accepted values here change depending on which country is provided. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

postalCode.description:
The zip or postal code of the user. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

country.description:
The user’s country. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

imageUrl.description:
The URL of the user’s avatar. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

phone.description: The user’s phone number. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.

jobTitle.description:
The user’s job title. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

industry.description:
The industry the user works in. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

aboutMe.description:
A short bio about the user. This data syncs from the user’s Autodesk profile.
Max length: 255

accessLevels.description: Flags that identify a returned user’s access levels in the account or project.

accountAdmin.description: Indicates whether the user is an account administrator for the account.

projectAdmin.description: Indicates whether the user is a project administrator for the project.

executive.description: Indicates whether the user is an executive in the account.

addedOn.description: The timestamp when the user was first given access to any product on the project.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the project user was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

companyId.description: The ID of the company that the user is representing in the project. To obtain a list of all company IDs associated with a project, call GET projects/:projectId/companies.

companyName.description:
The name of the company to which the user belongs.
Max length: 255

roleIds.description: A list of IDs of the roles that the user belongs to in the project.

roles.description: A list of the role IDs and names that are associated with the user in the project.

id.description: The ID of a role that the user belongs to in the project.

name.description: The name of a role that the user belongs to in the project.

status.description: The status of the user in the project. A pending user could be waiting for their products to activate, or the user hasn’t accepted an email to create an account with Autodesk.

key.description: A keyword that identifies the product.

access.description: The user’s type of access to the product identified by key.
